title: Eisalaamey Eisalaam Lyrics Aadhi Bhagavan Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Eisalaamey eisalaam
Singers: Manasi Scott & Rahul Nambiar (Harmony)
Movie: Aadhi Bhagavan
Music: Yuvan
Lyrics : Snehan

Eisalaamey eisalaam
aanum pennum eisalaam
mooga theeyil vegalaam
vaa.. vaa.. vaa…..

Ilamai ennum thee pori
yeriyum podhe poo pari
enthan dhegam strawberry
vaa.. vaa.. vaa….

Aasai ennum thaai mozhi
pesi paarka or vazhi
asaiva aatril nee kuli
inbathil thenaaga aal illada….

ooooooh .ooooo hooo ooooh
ooooooh .ooooo hooo ooooh
ooooooh .ooooo hooo ooooh

iskkalabi iskkalabi aavo aavo aavo
iskkalabi iskkalabi aavo aavo aavo

Minsaram pola santhosam thedum
velvettu poomettu naanthaanada
samsaaratholla ingutu illa
unnoda vegatha nee kaatu da . ho ...

hey raathiri aana rangoli da
ellaarum inga pangaali da
vaaliba kaatil deewali da
veenaa nee podathey ne poiveli da

Ullasam thaedi urachagam thaedi
mukthikum bakthikum nee koorada
pollaatha ulagam sonnaale kalagam
ponnukkum bothaikum poi sollalaam

Ellarum inge bakthan illa
unmaiyil yaarum buddhan illa
aasayil asaivam thappey illa
thappilaa vaazhkaiyil uppey illa

iskkalabi iskkalabi aavo aavo aavo
iskkalabi iskkalabi aavo aavo aavo

Eisalaamey eisalaam
vettaiyaada vaa salaam
veru ulagam thaedalam
vaa ..vaa.. vaa ..

Hey ..thaanam thandha boomi da
thaangi pidikkum saami da
vaazhndhu theerthaan gnyaani da
soragatha verengum thedatha da

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Eisalaamey Eisalaam'?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, celebrating the connection between lovers.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Aadhi Bhagavan'?

The song is featured during a romantic sequence, highlighting the chemistry between the lead characters.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Manasi Scot and Rahul Nambiar, with music composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was 'Eisalaamey Eisalaam' released?

The song was released on October 7, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Eisalaamey Eisalaam' from the movie *Aadhi Bhagavan* is a delightful romantic duet that encapsulates the joy of love. With its upbeat tempo and engaging lyrics, it evokes feelings of happiness and celebration. The collaboration between Manasi Scot and Rahul Nambiar brings a unique charm to the track, making it a favorite for weddings and romantic occasions. The song's vibrant energy and melodic composition by Yuvan further enhance its appeal, making it a memorable addition to Tamil cinema's musical landscape.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Eisalaamey Eisalaam from the movie Aadhi Bhagavan is a vibrant duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance and celebration. With the enchanting voices of Manasi Scot and Rahul Nambiar, paired with Yuvan's captivating music, this song is sure to uplift your spirits. Dive into the melodious journey that intertwines love and joy, making it a perfect addition to your playlist.
stanzaMeanings: Come, come, let’s enjoy together, both men and women, in the fiery heat, come.. come.. come…..
When youth is like a fire, blooming flowers, my body is like a strawberry, come.. come.. come….
Desires speak like a mother’s words, there’s a way to see, if you dive into the sweetness, there’s no one like you….
ooooooh .ooooo hooo ooooh ooooooh .ooooo hooo ooooh ooooooh .ooooo hooo ooooh
iskkalabi iskkalabi come, come, come, iskkalabi iskkalabi come, come, come
Happiness is like a light, searching for joy, in this world, there’s no one like you, show your speed. ho ...
Hey night, it’s like a rangoli, everyone here is a friend, in the festival of life, don’t let go, you are the light.
Searching for joy, searching for freedom, you can’t just say the world is a battlefield for gold and wealth.
Everyone here is a devotee, in truth, no one is wise, in desire, there’s no mistake, in life, there’s no loss.
iskkalabi iskkalabi come, come, come, iskkalabi iskkalabi come, come, come
Come, come, let’s enjoy the hunt, let’s seek a different world.. come.. come.. come ..
Hey, this land has been given, it holds the divine, the wise have lived and fulfilled, seeking the heavens without fail.
